privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated clinical trial data created dynamically via python-docx during setup. It requires editing a draft document at /home/ga/Documents/draft_icf.docx and exporting the finalized version to /home/ga/Documents/final_icf_v2.docx. The required formatting demands Arial font at 12pt, and the addition of a document footer containing the strings 'ONC-2026-01' and 'Version 2.1'.
